_comment: The scan registry. SAFETY GATE: every entry carries expectSymbol; if the on-chain symbol() does not match, the scanner publishes NOTHING for the entry and flags it for human review — a wrong address must never produce a published grade for the wrong contract. New entries by reviewed PR only. Addresses below were seeded from research and are verified by that gate on the first live scan.

tokens.name: USD Coin
tokens.notes: Fiat stablecoin (Circle) — pausable/blacklistable/upgradeable by design and disclosed. Scored under the methodology v0.2 fiat-stablecoin profile: issuer-controlled issuance and administration re-anchor upward only while an approved admin-disclosure claim verifies against the chain each scan; redeemability replaces liquidity permanence (out of automated scope); custodial issuers are capped at B+. Until the issuer-disclosure claim is approved, the profile caps at C (insufficient data).

tokens.name: Wrapped Ether
tokens.notes: Canonical Base WETH predeploy. Scored under the standard profile: it is code-enforced (no owner, no privileged powers, 1:1 wrap/unwrap in code), so it needs no custodial re-weighting — there is no issuer to disclose.

tokens.name: Coinbase Wrapped Staked ETH
tokens.notes: Custodial liquid-staking wrapper (Coinbase). Scored under the methodology v0.2 custodial-wrapped profile — same semantics as cbBTC. Until an approved issuer-disclosure claim verifies, the profile caps at C (insufficient data).

tokens.name: Dai Stablecoin
tokens.notes: Bridged representation of DAI on Base, graded on its Base contract structure, not on mainnet DAI. Scored under the methodology v0.2 bridged profile: if minting is verified on-chain to be restricted to the allowlisted canonical bridge, issuance anchors high and the report carries a derivative-trust note; otherwise it falls back to the standard treatment. Liquidity permanence is N/A (a canonical wrapper makes no LP-lock promise).

tokens.name: Coinbase Wrapped BTC
tokens.notes: Custodial wrapped asset (Coinbase). Pausable/blacklistable by design and disclosed by the issuer. Scored under the methodology v0.2 custodial-wrapped profile: issuer control re-anchors upward only while an approved admin-disclosure claim verifies each scan; redeemability replaces liquidity permanence; capped at B+. Until the disclosure claim is approved, the profile caps at C (insufficient data).

tokens.name: Solana (bridged to Base)
tokens.notes: Bridged representation of the Solana L1 native coin on Base (native SOL is locked on Solana and an ERC-20 minted on Base via the Base–Solana bridge; see docs.base.org/base-chain/quickstart/base-solana-bridge). Promoted from auto-discovery to the hand-curated registry to assign the native-representation profile. Published as NS (Not Scored): Assay's automated methodology grades token contracts, not an L1's consensus or its bridge operators, so the wrapper's facts publish without a letter grade. Address confirmed liquid on Base and symbol-gated as SOL; owner should confirm it is the intended canonical bridge representation.

tokens.name: ATA Coin
tokens.notes: Pre-deployment; address placeholder. PERMANENT RULE: when ATA deploys, this entry stays coi:true — Assay publishes ATA's raw dimension facts but never a grade. The operator of Assay is ATA's founder. See COI-POLICY.md.
